## Meeting Purpose

[Interview with Carmen Corio for Account Strategist role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Carmen has strong CS and account management experience, but lacks marketing background](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [GrowthX is looking for technical ability and client project management skills](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Company is too early-stage for Carmen currently, but potential fit in 3-6 months](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=2270.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview

  - AI-driven growth marketing startup, \<1 year old with \~35 customers
  - [Leverages AI workflows to generate marketing content for clients](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Clients managed by pods: account strategist, managing editor, content manager](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Account strategists execute high-level strategy, manage client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)

### Carmen's Background

  - [Extensive CS experience at companies like Airbnb, Silktide, Guesty, 1Password](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Strong in building processes, relationship management, strategic account growth](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Lacks formal marketing background but has related experience in engagement campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)

### Role Requirements

  - [Technical ability to champion product internally and provide engineering feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [Strong client project management and juggling multiple client priorities](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Ability to leverage marketing tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, GA4](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=2031.0)
  - [Experience with AI and prompting (Carmen has some relevant experience)](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=2067.0)

### Potential Fit Challenges

  - [GrowthX is services-focused vs Carmen's SaaS background](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)
  - [Company is early-stage with less developed onboarding/processes](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=2350.0)
  - [Marketing knowledge gap may be too much to overcome currently](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=2247.0)

### Future Potential

  - [Andi expressed interest in Carmen joining in 3-6 months when more established](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=2270.0)
  - [Both agreed to stay connected on LinkedIn for future opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=2312.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andi to connect with Carmen on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=2316.0)
  - [Carmen to follow GrowthX's page for updates](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=2379.0)
  - [Revisit potential fit in 3-6 months when company is more established](https://fathom.video/share/Kz37mzJctYYXcxod9mYer_wPBMynpuQR?tab=summary&timestamp=2362.0)
